html: This reminds me of an idea that I build a PoC of many years ago (maybe 2013 if I recall) that I always felt was the nugget of a useful idea.  You would SSH into a server and processes on the other end would emit data which was then displayed in a webapp that was served from a localhost port, with a local backend that consumed the data.  So for example a short-lived web-based remote 'top'.  I did it as part of a company-internal hackathon and thought it was really cool, but nobody else was impressed with it.  It was a very half-baked idea, and this looks like a fully-baked version of it.  I'll check it out.
